# Third-party notices

The extension bundles these unmodified ESM distribution files for local, offline runtime use:

| Package | Version | Selected license | Source | Bundled files | Local license |
|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| marked | 18.0.6 | MIT | https://github.com/markedjs/marked | `marked.esm.js` | [`LICENSE.marked.txt`](./LICENSE.marked.txt) |
| dompurify | 3.4.12 | Apache-2.0 | https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify | `purify.es.mjs` | [`LICENSE.dompurify-Apache-2.0.txt`](./LICENSE.dompurify-Apache-2.0.txt) |

Both complete license texts are included beside this notice. DOMPurify is used under the Apache-2.0 option offered by its dual-license distribution.
